title: Urban Systems & City Scaling

sublinear.formula: Y_infra ~ N^{0.85}: infrastructure = EML-2 (power law = exp(0.85·log N))

superlinear.formula: Y_social ~ N^{1.15}: innovation/crime = EML-2 (power law with β>1)

depth_pattern.insight: Urban scaling law depth follows EML-2 (measurement) except pure counts (EML-0)

transitions.object: Urban phase transitions: growth, collapse, segregation

urban_growth_takeoff.why: Population threshold = real count = EML-2 shadow

segregation.threshold: Tipping point ~30% minority tolerance: TYPE2 Horizon
segregation.formula: Schelling model: EML-0 (binary preference) → EML-∞ at threshold

innovation.object: Urban innovation: patent rates and knowledge spillovers

analysis.knowledge_spillover: Jacobs diversity: cross-sector learning = EML-2 (log diversity)
analysis.startup_mortality: Startup failure: exp(-λt) = EML-1 → EML-2 (with competition)

innovation_cascade.why: Technological paradigm shifts: S-curve = EML-3 (complex phase, diffusion wave)
innovation_cascade.example: Internet diffusion: sigmoid = erf function = EML-3 (via Gaussian integral)

innovation.new_finding: INNOVATION DIFFUSION (S-CURVE) = EML-3: sigmoid via Gaussian = complex oscillatory

metabolism.object: Urban metabolism: energy and material flows

flows.energy: Energy consumption ~ N^{1.0}: EML-0 (per capita linear)
flows.waste: Waste ~ N^{1.0} to N^{1.1}: EML-0 to EML-2

zipf_law.formula: City size rank r: P(r) ~ r^{-1}: Zipf = EML-2 (power law)
zipf_law.why: P(r) = C·exp(-log(r)): EML-2 (log of rank = real measurement)

verdicts.new_result: Innovation diffusion (S-curve, sigmoid)=EML-3: complex oscillatory via erf

key_theorem: Urban EML Theorem (S339): Urban scaling laws = EML-2 (power laws); pure linear counts = EML-0. Urban phase transitions (growth takeoff, collapse, Schelling segregation) = TYPE2 Horizon shadow=2. Zipf's Law = EML-2 (rank-size = real measurement). NEW: Innovation diffusion (S-curve, sigmoid) = EML-3: sigmoid = erf function via Gaussian integral = complex oscillatory. This is the first urban EML-3 object — technological paradigm shifts have complex oscillatory depth, matching the social contagion EML-3 (S305).
rabbit_hole_log: Urban tipping: TYPE2 Horizon shadow=2 (Schelling, collapse, takeoff)
Joins complex contagion (S305) as EML-3 in social/urban systems
